gDRplots 0.0.113
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Single-agent plots

Function to plot drug response curves for single-agent data

plot_boxplot_metric_sa()
Plot box plots for metric for single-agent data grouped by selected variable
plot_boxplot_metric_sa_by_CLs()
Plot box plots for metric for single-agent data grouped by cell line names
plot_boxplot_metric_sa_by_drugs()
Plot box plots for metric for single-agent data grouped by drug names
plot_boxplot_metric_sa_by_grp()
Plot box plots for metric for single-agent data grouped by selected variable
plot_dose_response_sa()
Plot drug response curves for single-agent data
plot_dose_response_sa_by_CLs()
Plot drug response curves for single-agent data for selected call lines and drugs
plot_dose_response_sa_by_drugs()
Plot drug response curves for single-agent data for selected call lines and drugs

Combo plots

Function to plot averaged values heatmaps for combo data

heatmap_combo_metrics()
Plot heatmaps of fitted values for combination metrics data
heatmap_combo_metrics_panel()
Plot panel of heatmaps of fitted values for combination metrics data
heatmap_combo_with_isoref()
Plot heatmaps of averaged values for combination data
heatmap_combo_with_isoref_panel()
Plot panel of heatmaps with fitted and reference data for isobolograms
heatmap_combo_with_isoref_panel_common()
#' Plot panel of heatmaps with fitted and reference data for isobolograms
heatmap_combo_with_isoref_panel_independent()
Plot panel of heatmaps with fitted and reference data for isobolograms
plot_boxplot_metric_combo()
Plot box plots for metric for combo data grouped by selected variable
plot_boxplot_metric_combo_by_CLs()
Plot box plots for metric for combo data grouped by cell line names
plot_boxplot_metric_combo_by_drugs()
Plot box plots for metric for combo data grouped by drug names
plot_boxplot_metric_combo_by_grp()
Plot box plots for metric for combo data grouped by selected variable
plot_combination_index()
Plot line plot of combination index
plot_dose_response_combo()
Plot drug response curves for combo data
plot_dose_response_combo_panel()
Plot panel with drug response curves for single-agent data to control quality of the data

Quality control plots for Processing Report

QC plots for Processing Report with all helpers

heatmap_control_mapping_qc()
Plot heatmap of mapping controls to treated for single-agent and combo data to control quality of the data
pheatmap_qc()
Plot pretty heatmap for single-agent or combo data to control quality of the data
plot_dose_response_sa_qc()
Plot drug response curves for single-agent data to control quality of the data
plot_dose_response_sa_qc_panel()
Plot panel with drug response curves for single-agent data to control quality of the data
plot_fitting_acc()
Visualization for the quality control of the fitting for single-agent data
plot_plate()
Plot data from a specific column
plot_plate_stack_info()
Plot plate data (Heatmap + Dose Ranks + Smart Legend + Explicit QC)
plot_single_plate_stack_info()
Plot a single plate's stack info
plot_var_distribution_qc()
Plot a violin plot for normalized or averaged data (single-agent and combo) to control the quality of the data
plot_var_stat_qc()
Lollipop plot for metric single-agent data to control quality of the data

Pretty heatmap with annotation

Functions to plot annotated heatmap with helpers

get_hm_title()
Get Legend Title
pheatmap_with_anno_cd()
Plot pretty heatmap with annotations for co-dilution data
pheatmap_with_anno_combo()
Plot pretty heatmap with annotations for combo data
pheatmap_with_anno_combo_metrics()
Plot heatmap with annotations for combo metrics data
pheatmap_with_anno_sa()
Plot pretty heatmap with annotations for single-agent data
prep_pheatmap_matrix()
Prep matrix with metric value based on the Metrics assay

PRISM visualisation

Functions to plot PRISM visualisation with helpers

create_PRISM_plot_list_combo()
Create a nested list of plots for PRISM data with combo metrics
create_PRISM_plot_list_sa()
Create a nested list of plots for PRISM data with single-agent metrics
create_PRISM_summary_list()
Create a list of PRISM association table
.create_PRISM_plot_list()
Create a list of PRISM plots for a selected type of experiment
.get_data_type()
Check data type
.get_n_top_asssoc()
Get n-top linear associations
plot_boxplot_meta()
Plot boxplot for metric values grouped by metadata from DepMap
plot_boxplot_num()
Plot boxplot for categorical features
plot_boxplot_num_panel()
Plot panel with boxplots
plot_scatter_with_corr()
Plot scatter with correlation
plot_scatter_with_corr_panel()
Plot panel with scatter with correlation
plot_volcano_assoc()
Volcano plot with association
plot_volcano_assoc_panel()
Plot panel with volcano plot and according to the data type - scatter plots or box plots
prep_dt_assoc()
Prep table with calculated linear associations
prep_dt_response_dose_sa()
Prep table with metric values by doses for single-agent experiment
prep_dt_response_metric_diff()
Prep table with metric values for combination experiment
prep_dt_response_metric_sa()
Prep table with metric values for single-agent experiment
prep_dt_response_scores()
Prep table with metric values for combination experiment

Color helpers

Plot color helpers

fill_ann_color_map()
Fill missing values in the color map for annotation
get_ann_color_map()
Create color map for annotation
get_col_luminance()
Calculate the luminance of a color
get_iso_colors()
get_iso_colors
get_qual_colors()
Create list of qualitative colors
is_color_dark()
Determine whether or not a color is dark
is_valid_color()
Determine whether or not a color name is valid

Utils

Utils function

compute_distances()
Compute distance between rows of a matrix.
create_log_seq()
create a log-sequence
round_to_unique_string()
Round numbers to unique string

Chemical genomics visualisation

Functions to plot chemical genomics visualisation with helpers

analyze_cgs()
Analyze Chemical Genomics (CGS) Data and Perform GSEA
plot_cgs_ranking()
Plot Chemical Genomics Screen GSEA Results

On this page

Developed by Marc Hafner, Janina Smola, Bartosz Czech, Dariusz Scigocki, Arkadiusz Gladki.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
